channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer in 10th sends Guardians to stunning 7-5 win over Yankees, close to 2-1 in ALCS
item.description: Pinch-hitter Jhonkensy Noel tied the score with a two-out home run in the ninth inning and David Fry hit a two-run homer in the 10th, rallying Cleveland over the New York Yankees 7-5 and pulling the Guardians to 2-1 in the AL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers to lead off NLCS Game 4 for Dodgers against Mets
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Shohei Ohtani homered against Jose Quintana leading off Game 4 of the National League Championship Series on Thursday night, putting the Los Angeles Dodgers ahead of the New York Mets.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Canadian former Olympic snowboarder is wanted in a US drug trafficking case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A former Olympic snowboarder for Canada has been charged with running a drug trafficking ring that shipped vast amounts of cocaine across the Americas and killed four people, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL player's Best Defense Foundation helps veterans at home
item.description: A former NFL linebacker, Donnie Edwards, created the Best Defense Foundation in 2018 to honor and celebrate war veterans.
item.dc:creator: Marielena Balouris, ABC 4

item.title: Liberty hope their last-second shot provides a new outcome, a WNBA title, rather than 1999's letdown
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — It's been 25 years since the New York Liberty had a chance to close out a WNBA championship. Just like in 1999, a last-second shot gave them the opportunity to play for a title. This time around, the Liberty are hoping for a different outcome.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Leonard won't play for Los Angeles Clippers to start the season while rehabbing knee, report says
item.description: Kawhi Leonard won’t play for the Los Angeles Clippers to start the season because of ongoing rehabilitation from inflammation in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: All-Star 1B Freddie Freeman out of Dodgers' lineup for Game 4 of NLCS against Mets
item.description: First baseman Freddie Freeman is out of the Los Angeles Dodgers’ lineup for Game 4 of the National League Championship Series against the New York Mets.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 76ers' Jared McCain hospitalized after scary fall during preseason game
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers guard Jared McCain was caught up in a scary moment on Wednesday night in a preseason game against the Brooklyn Nets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Big Game Bound: Texans head to Lambeau Field in AFC/NFC clash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — The NFC North is proving to be the best division in football through the first six weeks of the NFL season. Minnesota (5-0), Detroit (4-1), Chicago (4-2) and Green Bay (4-2) have a combined .773 winning percentage, the highest by a division at week 7 or later in league history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Nardiello - Senior Sports Producer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Each Mets, Yankees home game generates over $20 million for NYC
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – With a potential Subway World Series around the corner, New Yorkers are spending big on the Yankees and Mets.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Clayton Kershaw planning to pitch again next season
item.description: Clayton Kershaw says he plans to return to the Los Angeles Dodgers for his 18th season next year. The three-time NL Cy Young Award winner isn’t pitching in the current playoffs because of a bone spur in his left big toe that sidelined him for the final month of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ricky Pearsall returns to the 49ers practice for the first time since shooting
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall returned to the field for practice on Monday for the first time since he was shot in the chest during an attempted robbery nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears TE Cole Kmet catches 2 of Caleb Williams' 4 TD passes, handles long snaps in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: WATCH: Jarrett Payton loves what he's seeing from the Bears' offense in the attached video from Monday's WGN Morning News. LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rising returns, but Utes fall flat against ASU, 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising was back at quarterback, but the Utes offense continued to struggle to score touchdowns in a 27-19 loss at Arizona State Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
